text/brand.description: Branded text accent — themed callouts, signatures. Use sparingly.

elevation/compact/rest.description: Compact raised surface at rest — cards, dropdowns, popovers.

elevation/broad/rest.description: Broad raised surface at rest — modals, sheets.

Type.description: Visual type — affects CSS styles only. Becomes a className-based prop.

summary.slots: left-icon (icon, optional), arrow-left (icon, optional), title (text, optional), right-icon (icon, optional), cart (icon, optional)

screens.name: Home / No parcels (empty state)
screens.layout: 402px × hug; vertical flex; gap: 0px; align: start; justify: start; min-height: 780px; background-color: #fbfafb; overflow: clip; border-radius: 0px

tree.name: App container
tree.layout: fill × hug; vertical flex; gap: var(spacing/stack/lg); padding: var(spacing/stack/lg) var(spacing/density/md) var(spacing/density/md) var(spacing/density/md); align: start; justify: start

children.name: Card container
children.layout: fill × hug; horizontal flex; gap: var(spacing/stack/sm); align: start; justify: start

children.name: Parcels container
children.layout: fill × hug; vertical flex; gap: var(spacing/stack/md); padding: var(spacing/stack/md) 0px 0px 0px; align: start; justify: start

children.name: Your parcels
children.style: color: var(--text-brand); font-family: "Nunito Sans", sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 140%

children.name: Card Row
children.layout: fill × hug; vertical flex; gap: 16px; padding: var(spacing/density/xl) 16px; align: center; justify: center

children.name: You don’t have any parcels to drop off or collect. When you send a parcel, you can find your QR codes here.
children.content:
You don’t have any parcels to drop off or collect.
When you send a parcel, you can find your QR codes here.
children.style: color: #444444; font-family: "Nunito Sans", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 150%
background-color: #eae8ed; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px rgba(213, 209, 218, 0.3); border-radius: radius/md
